cut_decision.manual_reason: Chris fifth correction 13:34 CT: include Sam's full intro (personal sharing about himself, his kids, Brandon's encouragement, the Sturt All Yet quote, the humility of approaching the text) BEFORE 'Let me pray'. Cut starts at Sam's first word 'Good morning, everyone.' at 1107.2s (18:27 source). The earlier 22:42 cut missed ~3 min 35 sec of intro ('Good morning' through '...who sits enthroned in heaven with angels bowing down before him'). End unchanged from 50:33 (5 sec after the real 'We love you Lord, amen' at 50:28).
